blocks.text: We're reading narrative shorts — and producing some of them.

Rare Pond makes films that transport you somewhere else — a world with its own rules, its own weather, its own logic. That's the throughline we're looking for, and it matters far more to us than genre. Science fiction, fairy tale, horror, magical realism, something that doesn't have a name yet: all of it is open. What we need is a story that can actually be made on a micro budget and still feel enormous on screen. The best submissions build their world out of atmosphere, character, sound, and a few precise images — not out of money.

Narrative short films. Not features, not documentaries, not sketches or web series. An alternate world. The film should take an audience out of their own reality — whether that's a fully invented world, or ours tilted just far enough that it stops being ours. Any genre. We care about the transporting quality, not the shelf it sits on. Genuinely micro-budget. A small cast, a handful of locations we could plausibly get, practical craft over spectacle. If the script opens on a crowd of two hundred, it isn't for this. Ambition in the idea is exactly what we want — ambition in the line items is what we can't do.

Send the script as a PDF, along with a short note about the world it lives in and roughly what it would take to shoot. Standard screenplay format is appreciated but it isn't a hard gate — we'd rather read a great story in an imperfect template than the reverse. We read everything that comes in, and we'll come back to you either way. If a script clicks, the next conversation is a real one about how we'd actually make it. You keep the rights to your work. Sending us a script doesn't hand us anything — if we want to produce it, we'll ask, and we'll put it in writing.

blocks.buttonLabel: See the kind of films we make
